---
title: "Wecloming our summer interns to the lab"
date: 2026-06-02
categories:
  - news
---

We are pleased to welcome our summer interns to the lab, who will be working with us as part of the Future Ready Summer Internship scheme. This year we will be hosting 4 interns: Lorraine Temple, Dia Nayun, Sophie Wegner and Lucy Taylor.

![](/images/interns2026.png){width="697"}

They will be working on a variety of projects across the lab including research in cognition and decision-making, developing research engagement strategy for the lab, and supporting our outreach and stakeholder events.

You can find out more about each of the new interns on their profiles:

-   [Lorraine Temple](https://themindlab.uk/people/lorraine_temple.html)

-   [Dia Nayun](https://themindlab.uk/people/dia_nayun.html)

-   [Sophie Wegner](https://themindlab.uk/people/sophie_wegner.html)

-   [Lucy Taylor](https://themindlab.uk/people/lucy_taylor.html)

We will be sharing updates on the work of our interns over the coming months, so keep an eye on the lab website for more information about their projects and experiences in the lab.
